Powerful

Scalable up to 200,000 ASIC miners and 25,000 GPU/CPU miners. Feature rich and flexible to serve high demanding operations

Maximize profit

Profit switching based on real time revenue and power consumption. Detection of profitable investment field with automatic update.

Easy

Start earning within a minute.s Automatic setup of all popular mining pools on our platform with just a click.

With AlphaBonds LTD

Hardware Profitability

Our long time experience in creating mining software, especially driver management software like DriverMax, combined with our ever growing user base, allowed us to evaluate the mathematical capabilities of almost all existing hardware devices.

Sustainable service

Sustainable and ethical solution to mining, investing and portfolio management. Easier, more accessible and more profitable for anyone.

Seemless operation

We designed our platform with the help of our users, implementing features that best work for you.

Client efficient

You start with us at AlphaBonds LTD with what works best for you. From automatic sign in to your backoffice, to automatic transactions.

Client Focused

Increase your portfolio growth using our technology and financial development goals

AlphaBonds LTD is an international multi functional financial company engaged in investment activities, which are related to trading on financial markets, Real estate, cryptocurrency exchanges performed by qualified professional traders, nuclear Energy projects, space projects and Robotics projects which provides products and tools to generate income from digital assets.

Our platform contains the most necessary tools for working with financial assets: Real estate, cloud bitcoin mining, buying equipment with high hash power, crypto wallet, exchanger, and cryptocurrency portfolios. It is a meta-universe of investments available to everyone.

REAL ESTATE



Real estate has historically been one of the best performing investment assets and a core part of many of the most successful investor’s portfolios. But investing in real estate (the way institutions do) traditionally hasn’t been available to most investors without either meeting high net worth requirements or going through a complex and inefficient process, riddled with high fees and outdated middlemen. We enagaged in Real Estate Management with a simple idea: to use technology to make high-quality real estate investments available to everyone at a low cost.

NUCLEAR ENERGY PROJECT



Join our Affiliate Nuclear energy project on uranium minining and explorations. Being a highly regarded global investors which means we have an exceptional solid grounding for resilience and real success. We’re forward looking, firmly committed to all stakeholders, and focussed on maximising the value of our proven production and development assets.


FOREX & CRYPTOCURRENCY



Our goal is to provide our investors with a reliable source of high income, while minimizing any possible risks and offering a high-quality service, allowing us to automate and simplify the relations between the investors and the trustees. We work towards increasing your profit margin by profitable investment. We look forward to you being part of our community.

ROBOTIC PROJECT



What does it mean to create the future? At AlphaBonds LTD, it means taking risks and accelerating ideas to solve some of the world’s biggest challenges. It means the brightest, most innovative minds working from a unique vantage point that spans the full spectrum of aviation. Together, we form an unrivaled company, Across our businesses, nearly 130,000 engineers, researchers and visionaries come together to push the limits of known science and redefine how we connect and protect our world. Together, we are advancing aviation, building smarter defense systems and creating innovations. Join us as we support the ideas of designing and building innovative home robots, including the Roomba® robot vacuum and the Braava® family of mopping robots. But our project isn’t just about robots. It’s about you–and finding better ways to help you get more done.
  • High Quality Service
  • Sustainable Returns
  • User friendly platform
  • Expert-created content and resources
  • Worldwide Reach
